  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/nagios-devel Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    net-mgmt/nagios-devel/files patch-html__Makefile.in 
                                pkg-message.in

                                patch-sample-config__cgi.cfg.in 
  Log:
  - Update to 3.1.0
  - Switch to SF macro
  - Add dependency on PHP
  - Update conflicts
  - Add new options: EVENT_BROKER and UNHANDLED_HACK (both off by default)
  - Be more specific about perl version required
  
  PR:             ports/132098
  Submitted by:   Jarrod Sayers <jarrod@netleader.com.au> (maintainer)
